info.title: SAP Business One Service Layer - Production & MRP
info.description:
OpenAPI 3.0.3 description generated directly from the SAP Business One Service Layer OData V3 $metadata (namespace 'SAPB1').

Authentication is session based: call `POST /Login` with company/user/password; the Service Layer returns a `B1SESSION` cookie (and a `ROUTEID` cookie when load balanced) that must be sent on every subsequent request. Call `POST /Logout` to end the session.

Collection responses use the OData V3 envelope `{ "odata.metadata": ..., "value": [ ... ], "odata.nextLink": ... }`. Use `$inlinecount=allpages` to obtain the total count and the `Prefer: odata.maxpagesize=N` header to control server paging.

servers.description: SAP Business One Service Layer (OData V3 endpoint).

get.summary: Get a single ProductTree by key.
Get a single ProductionOrder by key.

post.summary: Bound action 'Cancel' on ProductionOrders (binding type ProductionOrder).

get.summary: Get a single ResourceCapacity by key.
Get a single ResourceGroup by key.
Get a single ResourceProperty by key.
Get a single Resource by key.

post.summary: Bound action 'CreateLinkedItem' on Resources (binding type Resource).

get.summary: Get a single RouteStage by key.
Get a single SalesForecast by key.

InlineCount.name: $inlinecount
InlineCount.description: Set to 'allpages' to include the total count (odata.count).

Prefer.name: Prefer
Prefer.description: Service Layer paging control, e.g. 'odata.maxpagesize=100'. Use 'odata.maxpagesize=0' to disable server paging.

Select.name: $select
Select.description: Comma-separated list of properties to return.

Top.name: $top
Top.description: Maximum number of records to return.
